title: Anti Cords Leaker
description: This texture packs replaces blocks that generate underground like ores and bedrock with stone and deepslate so ppl cant find youre cords with calculating where this ore/bedrock pattern is
body:
This texture packs replaces the texture of underground blocks like bedrock and ores with stone and deepslate so people cant look at theier generating postition and pattern to calculate youre cords. 
Made for people that stream and dont want that their base gets leaked

Shoutout to Itsme64's Texture Pack Fixer for converting the pack into the other versions
